design_philosophy.core_loop: Explore Monster World temples and caverns, defeat elemental bosses guarding spirits, upgrade equipment in hub town, use Pepelogoo companion ability to access new areas
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Permanent area lock-out after boss defeat creates commitment-based exploration; missable items and life drops incentivize thorough backtracking before progression
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Spiritual warrior girl hearing the pleas of elemental spirits and embarking on a redemptive quest, commanding both sword mastery and a magical companion
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Combines gating mechanics (equipment unlocks areas) with permanent missability (items, life drops, post-boss area closure), forcing players into deliberate exploration rather than allowing sequence-breaking or casual grinding

difficulty.lives_system: Health meter with pink life hearts; Pepelogoo can revive Asha if defeated when he is present
difficulty.checkpointing: The Sage of Save provides save points at key locations when talked to; no auto-checkpoints between boss fights
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Players can increase survivability by purchasing armor upgrades and collecting hidden life drops (150 total, 10 drops = 1 blue heart); shield selection provides elemental resistances; missable items create skill gates

progression.upgrade_system: Purchased equipment (armor increases health, shields provide defense and elemental resistances, swords increase attack with critical effects); found items (healing medicine, gold bars, hidden life drops); Pepelogoo unlocks platforming solutions
progression.unlock_mechanism: Equipment gates: stronger armor/swords purchased in town unlock ability to survive later areas; Pepelogoo ability expansion (double-jump, descent slowdown, fire-blow) unlocks new paths; elemental spirit companions provide region-specific puzzle solutions
replayability_hooks: 150 hidden life drops to collect across full playthrough
Missable items create permanent locks on builds
Multiple shield/sword options with different elemental properties may encourage different elemental paths
Post-boss area inaccessibility rewards thorough exploration on first visit

world_building_techniques: NPC dialogue establishes character relationships (Lamp Spirit's sarcasm, elemental spirits' personality quirks, Sage of Save's role as record-keeper)
Region names and themes tied to spirit types (Dragon Village Begonia, Darkworld Village Childam, Dwarf Village Lilypad, Fairy Village Alsedo) create thematic coherence
Pepelogoo's race backstory (blue Pepelogoos nearly wiped out, feared for magic) creates lore depth and justifies mechanical uniqueness
Environmental puzzle design (lava geysers use Pepelogoo as platform, fires block progress and require blowing out) integrates narrative elements with mechanics

boss_design.philosophy: Elemental spirits serve dual narrative and mechanical roles; boss encounters appear to be region-themed challenges guarding spiritual liberation
notable_bosses: Purapril XIII (kingdom ruler, appears as boss encounter)

faction_indicators: Elemental spirit affiliation (players encounter four distinct companion spirits, each tied to region and element type)
Kingdom structure under Purapril XIII suggests hierarchical world state
Pepelogoo's marginalization (blue variant nearly wiped out) establishes outsider protagonist within established social order
danger_signals: Spirits trapped and pleading for help indicates widespread magical threat or curse affecting Monster World
Permanent missability of items/life drops signals unforgiving world without safety nets
Post-boss area closure creates point-of-no-return moments affecting exploration freedom
environmental_storytelling: Regional theming (Dragon Village, Darkworld, Dwarf Village, Fairy Village) establishes distinct cultural zones
Environmental hazards tied to elemental spirits (lava geysers, falling rocks, fires, frozen terrain) reflect region identity
Hub town with merchant and Sage suggests established civilization and trade infrastructure
Oil lamp setting for Lamp Spirit creates mystical transitory space between worlds
